reviews.comment:
Lugar al aire libre para descansar, con todos los servicios. Se tarda un poco en la atencion o agregan personal o no se. Media hora para dos cafes es como mucho...

(Translated by Google)
An outdoor area to relax, with all amenities. The service is a bit slow; they either need to add staff or something. Half an hour for two coffees is a bit much...

reviews.comment:
Excelente parador con gran espacio verde y mesitas para unos mates. Ideal para que las mascotas paseen un poco. Siempre paro cada vez que viajo

(Translated by Google)
Excellent rest stop with a large green space and tables perfect for enjoying some mate. Ideal for letting pets walk around. I always stop here whenever I travel.
